overview: FarmTech AI is a comprehensive smart agriculture platform for rural farmers, featuring personalized dashboards, AI crop disease detection, marketplace, IoT automation, multilingual support, and an admin dashboard for monitoring user activity across the platform.
features: Admin dashboard with real-time activity timeline
Rolling 2,000-entry activity log with event filters
Admin role management — promote or remove admins
Activity tracking: logins, crop doctor, irrigation, marketplace, profile changes
Personalized farmer dashboard with IoT sensor data
AI Crop Doctor for disease detection
